SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.dialect.postgres

Class ColumnMetadata

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.dialect.postgres.ColumnMetadata
@Entity public class ColumnMetadata extends Object
Represents metadata for a database table column.

Encapsulates details such as column name, data type, length, nullability, default value, and other column-level constraints.

Typically used in schema introspection, ORM mapping, or code generation.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
